allowedUntested.plugins/opspal-core/hooks/post-fireflies: Requires a hermetic Fireflies MCP/post-tool harness with external credentials and transcript fixtures.
allowedUntested.plugins/opspal-core/hooks/post-gong-sync: Requires a hermetic Gong MCP/post-tool harness with external credentials and recording fixtures.
allowedUntested.plugins/opspal-core/hooks/post-task-runb: Depends on multi-hook Agent and TaskCompleted chain state; pending a dedicated compliance chain harness.
allowedUntested.plugins/opspal-core/hooks/post-win-loss-: Relies on cross-hook assessment artifacts and calibration fixtures that are not yet isolated.
allowedUntested.plugins/opspal-core/hooks/pre-fireflies-: Credentialed Fireflies API preflight still needs a service-stub harness.
allowedUntested.plugins/opspal-core/hooks/pre-gong-api-c: Credentialed Gong API preflight still needs a service-stub harness.
allowedUntested.plugins/opspal-core/hooks/pre-session-si: Needs a session-log replay harness that reproduces pre-tool Claude session state.
allowedUntested.plugins/opspal-core/hooks/routing-contex: Mutates shared routing-state files across sessions; pending isolated state-transition coverage.
allowedUntested.plugins/opspal-core/hooks/session-start-: Touches git/worktree state and needs an isolated repository fixture to test safely.
allowedUntested.plugins/opspal-gtm-planning/hooks/post-t: Telemetry hook writes GTM planning artifacts and needs isolated cycle fixtures.
allowedUntested.plugins/opspal-okrs/hooks/post-task-okr-: Telemetry hook writes OKR artifacts and needs isolated cycle fixtures.
